title: lippia oxycnemis
intro: Lippia oxycnemis, also known as Mexican marigold, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Lippia oxycnemis include relief from digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Lippia oxycnemis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and creams for topical application.
